title: The Turnover Number
description: Use the clues to decide which ingredient reveals the most information when consulted in the Royal Society book.

hints.text: The Royal Society book reveals whether an ingredient's alchemical is Solar or Lunar. Consulting a confirmed ingredient gives no new information. The most useful choice is the ingredient whose Solar/Lunar nature is most uncertain — the one most evenly split between the two possibilities.

Still uncertain (Solar / Lunar candidates both possible):
  ing4: 6912 Solar / 9504 Lunar alchemicals still consistent ← most balanced
  ing3: 6480 Solar / 9936 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing5: 6480 Solar / 9936 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing6: 6480 Solar / 9936 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing8: 6480 Solar / 9936 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing1: 10944 Solar / 5472 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing2: 10944 Solar / 5472 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
  ing7: 10944 Solar / 5472 Lunar alchemicals still consistent
Most informative ingredient to consult: ing4.
